tweets.text: Today in his remarks to the press, @SecBlinken discussed the #TTC Ministerial and how the U.S. and Europe are working to shape the future in trade & technology, and discussed the G20 summit and relations with China, Iran and DPRK. Read the full transcript: https://t.co/ItRQkvokQX

.@SecBlinken on U.S.-EU trade and technology: When we’re working together, we have a unique ability to help shape the norms, the standards, the rules that will govern the way technology is used, the technology that affects the lives of virtually all of our citizens. https://t.co/EGbZ4ei3z5

In the latest edition of Science Speaks, Dr. Aubrey Paris ​of @StateGWI explores how “Shark Tank”-like entrepreneurship might look very different with a green economy in mind. Read the full article in our DipNote blog: https://t.co/O9nzVe1QQQ

The U.S.-EU #TTC will promote shared economic growth that benefits workers and businesses. It will also serve as a vehicle to help fight the climate crisis and protect businesses, consumers, workers, and tackle unfair trade practices around the world. 🇺🇸🇪🇺 https://t.co/x35ToXxrHz https://t.co/KufwGqEZOO
Follow along as @GPA_AS Liz Allen previews @SecBlinken's events in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania today.
Watch Live: The U.S. and EU delegations to the U.S.-EU Trade and Technology Council Ministerial speak to the press in Pittsburgh. #TTC https://t.co/2Z40Q9dJ5Q
Live now! @SecBlinken participates in a Workforce Management into Tech Jobs Roundtable from Pittsburgh, PA. https://t.co/OBLCHLJE82

Today at approximately 3 p.m. EDT, @SecBlinken will participate in a Workforce Management into Tech Jobs Roundtable from Pittsburgh, PA. Watch live here on Twitter, https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz, and https://t.co/GeFkC7MCzK. https://t.co/KmgniApc5X

Convening in Pittsburgh this week, the United States-European Union Trade and Technology Council (#TTC) will promote trade and technology policies based on shared democratic values, while revitalizing ties with allies and partners. 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 https://t.co/x35ToXP2z7 https://t.co/JGFhZ9I5Zd

.@SecBlinken: We want and we need to bring a spirit of cooperation to tech diplomacy. Because the bottom-line truth is this: The United States cannot deliver on these pillars on our own. We need partners. https://t.co/7JugWLkU1C
In today’s “Ask Dr. Fauci,” Dr. Anthony Fauci @NIH shares what we can do to help end the COVID-19 pandemic and “get back to normal.” https://t.co/TEkrt1Z3Ba

Proud that our @USAPavilion at the @Expo2020Dubai will showcase and share the diversity of American culture by featuring over 275 performances from across the United States. https://t.co/6O1iXuunPs https://t.co/5LHoNv10Sv

The State Department is pleased to announce Zoohackathon 2021 — a global competition that brings together university students and coders to develop innovative technology solutions to combat wildlife trafficking and associated challenges. Learn more: https://t.co/jJeZv7Nj4h.

During today’s press briefing, @StateDeputySpox announced @WHAAsstSecty’s upcoming trip to Haiti, as well as the Secretary of @DHSgov designation of Croatia as the 40th country for entry into the Visa Waiver Program. More in the transcript: https://t.co/aEQtEwYvQM

Doreen Bogdan-Martin’s candidacy for Secretary-General of the UN International Telecommunication Union has been formally registered. The United States strongly supports her candidacy and continued leadership at the @ITU. #Doreen4SG https://t.co/JqKS4rLIW3

Join us in welcoming Jessica Stern to the State Department as the Special Envoy to Advance Human Rights of LGBTQI+ persons. Throughout her career, she has promoted and protected the human rights of LGBTQI+ persons, working around the world to change laws and reshape institutions. https://t.co/kXH4cABx6K

The State Department is seeking the most creative thinkers and new ideas to tackle the climate crisis. Join @GPatState on September 30 at #TogetherforthePlanet to discuss how we can leverage entrepreneurship for a sustainable future. Register at https://t.co/woSav7rdb9. https://t.co/ZmCqzDuqjq

.@POTUS: The evidence is clear: Climate change poses an existential threat to our lives, to our economy. And the threat is here; it’s not going to get any better. The question: Can it get worse? We can stop it from getting worse. https://t.co/cy9BJGG8C8

The United States, in partnership with the @_AfricanUnion and @gavi #COVAX, donated 210,300 doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine to Kenya. We are committed to working with our friends in Kenya and around the world to end the COVID-19 pandemic. https://t.co/yGI57RCQQH

.@POTUS: Around the globe, including here at home, brave lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer, and intersex (LGBTQI+) activists are fighting for equal protection under the law, freedom from violence, and recognition of their fundamental human rights. https://t.co/y8vUuRIp6i

The United States will continue to prioritize our African partners in our fight against COVID-19. In partnership with the @_AfricanUnion and @gavi #COVAX, we successfully delivered 464,090 doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine to the people of Angola. https://t.co/fAxQwzPjA7

The United States continues to lead the global fight against COVID-19. In partnership with @gavi #COVAX and the @_AfricanUnion, we delivered 250,380 doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine to our friends in the Democratic Republic of Congo. https://t.co/xfbYivqw3c

Ending the COVID-19 pandemic is a top priority for the United States. Today we are pleased to announce the donation of 100,620 doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine to our friends in Namibia, in close partnership with @gavi #COVAX and the @_AfricanUnion. https://t.co/QI0SVJ9m3G

If we want the international community to rise to the challenges of our time, whether COVID-19, the climate crisis or other challenges — it ultimately always comes down to whether governments like ours, step up — and bring others along with us. #UNGA76 https://t.co/yrH6EoOoH0
This week, Deputy Secretary of State Wendy Sherman embarks on her trip to Switzerland, Uzbekistan, India, and Pakistan. Follow along with her @DeputySecState. More: https://t.co/qEJprG4NvR.

During today’s briefing, @StateDeputySpox took questions from reporters addressing the human rights situation in Afghanistan, U.S.-Germany relations, and the Department’s first Enterprise Data Strategy. Read the transcript for more: https://t.co/qWFSaUJX7p.

At #UNGA76, @SecBlinken emphasized that it makes a difference when the U.S. shows up, listens, leads. It gives us a unique platform to bring others together in tackling the challenges of our time, as we deliver for the American people. https://t.co/Ja75zx7m1m

Live now! @SecBlinken and Singaporean Foreign Minister @VivianBala deliver remarks and sign the Singapore-United States Third-Country Training Program (TCTP) Memorandum of Understanding Renewal. https://t.co/RLGP4XBpC9

Today at 3:40 p.m. EDT, @SecBlinken and Singaporean FM @VivianBala will deliver remarks and sign the Singapore-United States Third-Country Training Program (TCTP) Memorandum of Understanding Renewal. Watch live here on Twitter, https://t.co/58Uc9lZRv7 and https://t.co/cxmLwb0zio. https://t.co/DTPIqEnhbX

The State Department is pleased to announce Zoohackathon 2021 -- a global competition that brings together university students and coders to develop innovative technology solutions to combat wildlife trafficking and associated challenges. Learn more: https://t.co/jJeZv84TVP

We are pleased to deliver an additional 188,370 Pfizer vaccine doses to the Bolivian people. The United States is proud to help save lives and end the COVID-19 pandemic in Bolivia and around the world. https://t.co/mEq8fWQiGF

.@SecBlinken: If we’re going to prevent cataclysmic consequences and keep within reach the essential goal of limiting global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius, every nation has to come to the table with their highest possible ambitions. https://t.co/qPi3XBnkoS

At the 76th Session of the @UN General Assembly, @POTUS outlines how we have prioritized rebuilding our alliances, recognizing they are essential and central to America’s enduring security and prosperity. https://t.co/gsYMBC4KmT

.@SecBlinken: This fall, the United States will release our new, comprehensive Indo-Pacific Strategy. Similar to ASEAN’s outlook, it will reflect Southeast Asia’s importance to the Indo-Pacific region, and the critical role that ASEAN plays in determining the region’s future. https://t.co/BmqJ4Ogyyc

.@POTUS: To ensure that our own future, we must work together with other partners — our partners — toward a shared future. Our security, our prosperity, and our very freedoms are interconnected as never before. And so, I believe we must work together as never before. #UNGA https://t.co/AQ7KllP8AJ

Have you read the latest on our official blog, DipNote? Recent entries highlight the work of sign language interpreters and @StateDeputySpox takes us on a journey exploring more about #UNGA. More below! https://t.co/87Rfebg8BB

.@POTUS before #UNGA76: I’m here today to share with you how the United States intends to work with partners and allies to answer these questions and the commitment of my new administration to help lead the world toward a more peaceful, prosperous future for all people. https://t.co/ql8RZBhENh

.@SecBlinken: We have to take bold steps right now to save lives – from expanding access to oxygen and therapeutics to treat the sick, to closing massive gaps in testing capacity. https://t.co/MyIFq6wVi4

.@SecBlinken: We have to build back better when it comes to global health security – to end this pandemic and put ourselves in a better position to prevent, to detect, to defeat the next one. https://t.co/9H5BMdkNOs

.@POTUS: The United States has put more than $15 billion toward the global COVID response. Planes carrying vaccines from the United States have already landed in 100 countries, bringing people all over the world a little “dose of hope," direct from the American people. #UNGA76 https://t.co/5dWWK4cN5P
The United States is committed to beating COVID-19. We are committed to working with the rest of the world to do it. And we will not stop until we get the job done. https://t.co/N96kEjoKRC

.@POTUS at the Global COVID-19 Summit: To beat the pandemic here, we need to beat it everywhere. I made, and I’m keeping, the promise that America will become the arsenal of vaccines, as we were the arsenal of democracy during World War Two. https://t.co/3raaM4Y8xD

.@SecBlinken at the Global COVID-19 Summit: It comes down to us – what we do in this critical moment in the weeks ahead, in the months ahead.  So let’s bring the urgency, let’s bring the rigor required to end the crisis and also prevent the next one. That really is our mission. https://t.co/SR3HnJtoy0

Today on “Ask Dr. Fauci,” Dr. Anthony Fauci @NIH underscores the safety of COVID-19 vaccines: “The adverse events are unusual and rare, as a matter of fact, and clearly the benefit of protecting yourself from COVID-19 far outweighs any risk of adverse events.” https://t.co/o8qSmemSbu

.@SecBlinken: @POTUS has made addressing the climate crisis a top priority. We’re taking into account how every bilateral and multilateral engagement we have – every policy decision we make – will impact our goal of putting the world on a safer, more sustainable path. #UNGA76 https://t.co/TYEoL09FUE

.@SecBlinken: Let’s be driven not only by the fear of all the damage the climate crisis can inflict – and already has inflicted – but also by the imagination of all the ways our response can actually make people’s lives better, now and into the future. #UNGA76 https://t.co/sGezG4OENS

Today the United States delivered 336,000 doses of the Johnson & Johnson COVID-19 vaccine to Guinea. We are committed to providing vaccines to our friends in Guinea and around the world to save lives and end the COVID-19 pandemic. https://t.co/juqEtBvQV7

The United States, in partnership with @_AfricanUnion and @gavi #COVAX, donated 336,000 does of the Johnson & Johnson COVID-19 vaccine to Mozambique. These vaccines will save lives and protect the people of Mozambique as we combat COVID-19 together. https://t.co/EJVEpolV13
That's a wrap for the 76th Session of the @UN General Assembly. Go behind the scenes with @SecBlinken as he shared our foreign policy priorities with world leaders at #UNGA76. https://t.co/Tf5GcKZRNE

.@POTUS: As we pursue diplomacy across the board, the United States will champion the democratic values that go to the very heart of who we are as a nation and a people: freedom, equality, opportunity, and a belief in the universal rights of all people. https://t.co/TkVKuugCiR

During today’s telephonic press briefing, @StateDeptSpox discussed UNGA High-Level Week, ending the COVID-19 pandemic, tackling the climate crisis, and holding the Taliban accountable in Afghanistan. #UNGA76 https://t.co/NTPDlUb3vP

The United States’ donation of 4.6 million doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine to Indonesia through @gavi #COVAX demonstrates our commitment to stand with the global community to save lives and bring an end to the COVID-19 pandemic. https://t.co/KcipDRmsGw

.@POTUS: Over the last eight months, I have prioritized rebuilding our alliances, revitalizing our partnerships, and recognizing they’re essential and central to America’s enduring security and prosperity. #UNGA76 https://t.co/WNVd3ENqIV

.@POTUS: As new technologies evolve, we’ll work together with our democratic partners to ensure that new advances in areas from biotechnology, to quantum computing, 5G, artificial intelligence, & more are used to lift people up, to solve problems & advance human freedom. #UNGA76 https://t.co/bGS4Vza0Qj
Live now! @StateDeptSpox Ned Price briefs on U.S. engagement in the 76th Session of the UN General Assembly and ongoing foreign policy priorities, from the @ForeignPressCtr. https://t.co/h0vpMO6vOd

Today at approximately 1 p.m. EDT, @StateDeptSpox will brief on U.S. engagement in the 76th Session of the UN General Assembly and ongoing foreign policy priorities, from the @ForeignPressCtr. Watch live here on Twitter, https://t.co/58Uc9lZRv7, and https://t.co/q69kBuwYKA. https://t.co/bFqqRHZ3NM

The United States is grateful for the assistance of the Gulf Cooperation Council member states in ensuring the safe transit from Afghanistan of tens of thousands of Americans, U.S. government personnel, and at-risk Afghans. https://t.co/eUy9Tyj4U5

The U.S. looks forward to building upon our cooperation with the @GCCSG. Together, we are confronting the COVID-19 pandemic, countering terrorism, deescalating regional tensions and reducing conflict, and advancing innovations in clean energy and climate policy. https://t.co/RDDKnPijy4

.@POTUS: The United States has put more than $15 billion toward the global COVID response. Planes carrying vaccines from the United States have already landed in 100 countries, bringing people all over the world a little “dose of hope," direct from the American people. #UNGA76 https://t.co/bUkbBDtWhU

The U.S. is committed to providing safe and effective COVID-19 vaccines to ensure no one is left behind in the fight against the pandemic. Through our partnership with @gavi and the @_AfricaUnion, we delivered 100,620 doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine to our friends in Gabon. https://t.co/5HoqRv4iCf

.@POTUS: The U.S. will continue to be the world’s largest contributor to humanitarian assistance: bringing food, water, shelter, emergency healthcare, and other vital, lifesaving aid to millions of people in need. #UNGA76 https://t.co/7DDNaCrvWq

The United States is proud to announce the delivery of 76,050 doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine to Mauritius, in close partnership with @gavi #COVAX and the @_AfricanUnion. We stand in solidarity with our friends in Mauritius as we combat this global pandemic together. https://t.co/Yj7votuWnX

The U.S. delivered 655,200 additional doses of the Johnson & Johnson COVID-19 vaccine to Ethiopia, via @gavi #COVAX and the @_AfricanUnion. We have now donated over 2.5 million doses to the people of Ethiopia and are committed to defeating this pandemic one delivery at a time. https://t.co/Gy43X7nFec

.@SecBlinken: Look at almost every place where you see threats to international peace and security today – and you’ll find that climate change is making things less peaceful, less secure, and rendering our response even more challenging. #UNGA76 https://t.co/Aa0d7RR9r9

.@SecBlinken on the climate crisis: We agree that to prevent cataclysmic consequences, all our nations must take immediate, bold actions to build resilience, to adapt to the unavoidable impacts, and move swiftly to a net-zero world. #UNGA76 https://t.co/ObyRGQqYmv
.@POTUS announces additional support with Congress to meet the goal of mobilizing $100 billion to support climate action in developing nations. https://t.co/zy0hB42cj7
Live Now! @SecBlinken hosts a press availability from the Palace Hotel in New York, NY. #UNGA76 https://t.co/6rziI5Eq5b

Today at approximately 4:45 p.m. EDT, @SecBlinken will host a press availability from the Palace Hotel in New York, NY. Watch live here on Twitter, https://t.co/58Uc9lZRv7, and https://t.co/hrTeLWTzlo. #UNGA76 https://t.co/lILF3ebkcZ

Tajikistan is an important partner in the global vaccination effort to save lives. The United States made a second delivery of 325,260 doses of Pfizer COVID-19 vaccines to the people of Tajikistan, with our total donation of vaccine doses to Tajikistan exceeding 1.8 million. https://t.co/csQFutCzYS

.@SecBlinken: The United States is committed to supporting the prosperity of our ASEAN partners and to working with ASEAN to advance peace, prosperity, and security in the Indo-Pacific. #UNGA76 https://t.co/uNooTYSKgy

The United States and ASEAN countries are promoting the sustainable development of maritime resources, increasing people-to-people connectivity, and advancing economic partnerships in the Indo-Pacific. #UNGA76 https://t.co/tx3eZ7qhab

Do you know there are more than 300 sign languages across the globe? On International Day of Sign Languages, we discuss sign languages beyond American Sign Language and our work to advocate for global linguistic rights. Read more in our DipNote blog: https://t.co/ipy20vhqDH

On International Day of Sign Languages, we honor visual forms of communication, which are just as indispensable as verbal and written communication. With 300+ different signed languages used worldwide, we commit to advocating for the deaf community's right to inclusion & access. https://t.co/F1TcNxEncX

.@POTUS has announced a $10 billion commitment to end hunger at home and abroad, this includes $5 billion for @FeedtheFuture, the U.S. government's global hunger and food security initiative. #UNGA76 https://t.co/jmXslUnSxr
.@POTUS discusses investments to help tackle the climate crisis through green infrastructure and electric vehicles -- which will also create good-paying jobs for workers. https://t.co/wTevBY7Hvn
Live now! @SecBlinken delivers remarks at the @UN Security Council Meeting on Climate and Security. https://t.co/lgHTgTU97B

Today at approximately 8 a.m. EDT, @SecBlinken will deliver remarks at the @UN Security Council Meeting on Climate and Security. Watch live here on Twitter, https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz, and https://t.co/SfmCJRP2iG. https://t.co/BTSWCXO6qf

At the 76th Session of the @UN General Assembly, @POTUS outlines how we have prioritized rebuilding our alliances, recognizing they are essential and central to America’s enduring security and prosperity. https://t.co/rXuOXjWdo6

.@POTUS at the Global COVID-19 Summit: To beat the pandemic here, we need to beat it everywhere. I made, and I’m keeping, the promise that America will become the arsenal of vaccines, as we were the arsenal of democracy during World War Two. https://t.co/wljyDUHoWG

In “Ask Dr. Fauci,” Dr. Anthony Fauci @NIH explains mRNA vaccine technology: “It’s really going to be one of the major vaccine advances of the future, and it’s already proven itself right now with the COVID-19 vaccine.” https://t.co/DN6uUrB9xJ

.@POTUS: To fight this pandemic, we need a collective act of science and political will. Already, the United States has put more than $15 billion toward the global COVID response. #UNGA76 https://t.co/XT7P7McFQ0

Join @PowerUSAID and @UnderSecStateJ tomorrow at 9:30 am EDT for a virtual #UNGA76 roundtable featuring activists, reformers, and investigative journalists on the frontlines of the global fight against corruption. Register here: https://t.co/0lDcdL0UkD. https://t.co/hlFSpyIa0O

Climate change is the greatest threat facing our world today. The United States has committed to reducing U.S. emissions by 50-52% over the next 10 years and announced bold policies to implement that commitment. We, however, cannot do this alone. We must act now. https://t.co/kGmDlDGXGU

The United States continues to lead global efforts to save lives, with additional assistance announced today for the Rakhine State and Rohingya refugee crisis. We urge other donors to join us and contribute to the humanitarian response.

Safe and effective vaccines are key to defeating COVID-19. @SecBlinken reflects on the U.S. commitment to donate more than 1.1 billion vaccines to the world. These doses are not sold and are shared with no strings attached or promises exacted. https://t.co/b998Goy8u4

At the Global COVID-19 Summit, @POTUS called on leaders to elevate global ambition to end the COVID-19 pandemic in 2022 and to build back better global health security to prevent and prepare for future pandemics. Read the fact sheet below to learn more: https://t.co/YqyRtmeYOz.

The United States has now delivered more COVID-19 vaccine doses than every other country in the world, combined. And millions more free doses are shipped each day. We will not stop until we get the job done. https://t.co/59OT9PNgQS

Today at approximately 2 p.m. EDT, @SecBlinken will deliver closing remarks at the Virtual COVID-19 Summit from the Palace Hotel in New York, NY. Watch live here on Twitter, https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz, and https://t.co/gxSdCvyLIv. https://t.co/3BqmlkZiDr

.@POTUS: The United States has put more than $15 billion toward the global COVID response. Planes carrying vaccines from the United States have already landed in 100 countries, bringing people all over the world a little “dose of hope," direct from the American people. #UNGA76 https://t.co/qJH6rVnMFZ
Live now! @POTUS convenes a Virtual COVID-19 Summit on the margins of the UN General Assembly in New York, NY. https://t.co/lkDwLNuJWW

Today at approximately 11 a.m. EDT, @POTUS will convene a Virtual COVID-19 Summit on the margins of the UN General Assembly in New York, NY. Watch live here on Twitter, https://t.co/58Uc9lZRv7, and https://t.co/utT8EPlR7r. https://t.co/iwSHswxG0D
No one is safe until everyone is safe from the global COVID-19 pandemic. #UNGA76 https://t.co/SXBiQPZcx0

We are pleased to deliver an additional 1,750,000 Moderna COVID-19 vaccine doses to our friends and neighbors in Mexico. The United States values our partnership with Mexico on many issues and is proud to help save lives and end the pandemic in Mexico and around the world. https://t.co/FJfGPcGXGK

.@POTUS: Instead of continuing to fight the wars of the past, we are fixing our eyes on devoting our resources to the challenges that hold the keys to our collective future. #UNGA https://t.co/3gskYrZYRS

.@POTUS before #UNGA76: I’m here today to share with you how the United States intends to work with partners and allies to answer these questions and the commitment of my new administration to help lead the world toward a more peaceful, prosperous future for all people. https://t.co/F89RXWVXPY

The United States is proud to donate an additional 2.58 million doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine to the Philippines as part of the broader U.S. commitment to make available 500 million Pfizer doses to @gavi for distribution through #COVAX. Together, we can end this pandemic. https://t.co/sW0Ei9eQ4H

.@POTUS: To ensure that our own future, we must work together with other partners — our partners — toward a shared future. Our security, our prosperity, and our very freedoms are interconnected as never before. And so, I believe we must work together as never before. #UNGA https://t.co/73VaBqrLOb

We are pleased to announce that 11,700 doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine were delivered to Dominica. Only by continuing to vaccinate the world can we win the battle against COVID-19 and move forward together. https://t.co/bW4lCCNz7c
Live now! @POTUS delivers remarks before the 76th Session of the @UN General Assembly. #UNGA76  https://t.co/ic5XwGUxvm

Today at approximately 10 a.m. EDT, @POTUS will deliver remarks before the 76th Session of the @UN General Assembly. Watch live here on Twitter, https://t.co/58Uc9lZRv7, and https://t.co/ILoAi9OxOy. #UNGA76 https://t.co/KINPyr74nq
At #UNGA76 the U.S. will defend human rights at home and around the world. Join us. Watch this video to learn what you can do in support of human rights. https://t.co/RaJ3RPRQUC

The United States is proud to announce its donation of more than 1.6 million doses of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine to Uganda. The U.S., in partnership with @gavi #COVAX and the @_AfricanUnion, has donated over 2 million COVID-19 vaccines to our friends in Uganda. https://t.co/EovGTpJZNi
We join our colleagues at @USEmbassyBeirut in remembrance of this solemn day in our history.

Let’s build on G7 outcomes with policies to drive decarbonization, invest in clean technologies, and together create a net-zero emissions future that leaves no one behind. #UNGA76 https://t.co/YpeIla1rCG
No one is safe until everyone is safe from the global COVID-19 pandemic. #UNGA76 https://t.co/sAY7ZlcmuC

What is #UNGA76 and what are the United States’ priorities? Assistant Secretary for Global Public Affairs Liz Allen explains what you need to know as @POTUS and @SecBlinken travel to the 76th Session of the @UN General Assembly this week in New York. https://t.co/Hox5FPOQ7l

The United States is committed to defending universal human rights and democratic values at home and around the world and upholding the international rules-based order that has maintained international peace and security. #UNGA76 https://t.co/ZnYG2d6Tti

Defending Democracy: The United States is hosting the Summit for Democracy in December and together with our partners, we will set forth an affirmative agenda for democratic renewal, the promotion of human rights, and the fight against corruption. #UNGA76 https://t.co/nBKPg59hEj

.@POTUS: The evidence is clear: Climate change poses an existential threat to our lives, to our economy. And the threat is here; it’s not going to get any better. The question: Can it get worse? We can stop it from getting worse. #UNGA76 https://t.co/4vlDQ9EOEr

The U.S. is committed to partner with the countries of the Americas to enhance climate ambition, accelerate climate action through regional cooperation, and strengthen resilience and adaptation. Read more about U.S. support for regional initiatives: https://t.co/e8otBToWkH. https://t.co/F1RhxmPqkz

.@POTUS Biden announces the creation of #AUKUS: "We’re taking another historic step to deepen and formalize cooperation among all three of our nations because we all recognize the imperative of ensuring peace and stability in the Indo-Pacific over the long term." https://t.co/4Oo1kTSt73

Have you read the latest on our official blog, DipNote? Recent entries highlight how virtual reality is building global connections, and we take a look at the experience of 2021 TIP Report Heroes in their @StateIVLP project. More below! https://t.co/87RfebxJt9

We thank our @DeptofDefense and community partners at @USAGMcCoy for all they are doing to welcome Afghan evacuees with open arms. Community support in Wisconsin helped donate books to these Afghan women, as they prepare for resettlement, and future study in the U.S. https://t.co/4HOAdDqY1a
In “Ask Dr. Fauci,” Dr. Anthony Fauci @NIH explains how COVID-19 vaccines can both protect against existing variants and prevent the emergence of new ones. https://t.co/Od8P0SB5IU
America’s alliances are our greatest asset, and leading with diplomacy means standing shoulder-to-shoulder with our allies and key partners once again. https://t.co/rtE6TaFkNw

What are the U.S. priorities at #UNGA76? Ending the COVID-19 pandemic, combating the climate crisis, promoting human rights, and defending democracy. With allies and partners, the U.S. will continue to address today’s global challenges and work towards a brighter future for all. https://t.co/wPQZydu0GV

.@SecBlinken: Through AUKUS, we will significantly deepen our cooperation on a range of security and defense priorities, including by strengthening our joint capabilities and interoperability. https://t.co/rjgPAfkKqV

Registration is now open for the 2021 #IndoPacificBizForum on October 28-29. Engage virtually with the U.S. and #IndoPacific governments and business leaders on economic recovery, climate action, and digital innovation. To learn more and register, visit: [https://t.co/iT4A5gNOqF]

.@SecBlinken on the #AbrahamAccords: “A year after the Accords and normalization agreements were signed, the benefits continue to grow. We’re seeing deepening diplomatic relationships.” Full remarks: https://t.co/9xH2R0MmzY. https://t.co/JN16lgpvfe
